name: jeremias
description: Monorepo JEREMIAS, pato travesso configurável para sites

scripts.postinstall: npm run build -w @duckjeremias/core && npm run build -w @duckjeremias/character-duck && npm run build -w @duckjeremias/react
scripts.build: npm run build -w @duckjeremias/core && npm run build -w @duckjeremias/character-duck && npm run build -w @duckjeremias/react
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @duckjeremias/core && npm run typecheck -w @duckjeremias/core && npm run typecheck -w @duckjeremias/character-duck && npm run typecheck -w @duckjeremias/react
scripts.publish:packages: npm run prepublish:packages && npm publish -w @duckjeremias/core --access public && npm publish -w @duckjeremias/character-duck --access public && npm publish -w @duckjeremias/react --access public
